summary: Comprehensive testing of AdVantage Studio iteration 5. All 10 features from the review request verified. Found and fixed one bug: SharePreview.js was looking for 'platform' at top-level of API response, but it was stored inside 'ad_data'. Fixed to extract from ad_data.platform. All backend APIs (8/8) and frontend features (10/10) pass.
passed_tests: App loads without compilation errors - no 'Module not found: @/pages/SharePreview' error
Character counter visible under Caption (111/125 rec 63206 max), Headline (19/40 rec 255 max), Description (70/30 rec 255 max) for Facebook
Twitter platform: character counter turns amber at 250 chars (>85% of 280 max)
Twitter platform: character counter turns red at 285 chars (>280 max)
Share button visible in preview toolbar (data-testid='share-btn')
Share button clicks POST /api/share (status 200) and shows success toast with URL
Platform logo badge visible as colored pill in preview bar (data-testid='platform-logo-badge')
Share preview at /share/{id} loads correctly with saved ad data and correct platform (after fix)
Invalid share ID at /share/BADID999 shows 'Preview Not Found' error with link back
Export button shows dropdown with 'Download as PNG' and 'Download as PDF' options
Validate Ad button shows validation results panel (0 errors, 1 warning, 5 passed for default data)
All 9 platform tabs switch correctly: Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Snapchat, Google Ads
Campaign objective 'Awareness/Reach' hides CTA section with message 'Reach ads typically don't show a CTA button'
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: SharePreview.js platform bug - was destructuring res.data.platform (undefined) instead of res.data.ad_data.platform. Platform is embedded in ad_data from the ShareButton payload. Now correctly reads ad_data.platform.
seed_data_creation: Created share entries via POST /api/share for testing: IDs b16f2ccf (instagram), and others from pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 5 review request are passing. Backend share endpoints (POST /api/share, GET /api/share/{id}) work correctly. Frontend features: app loads without errors, character counters show with correct platform-specific limits and color changes (amber at 85%, red at 100%), share button calls API and copies to clipboard, share preview page loads at /share/{id}, export dropdown works, validate ad shows results, all 9 platform tabs work, CTA hidden for awareness/engagement objectives. One bug was fixed: SharePreview.js now correctly reads platform from ad_data instead of top-level response.
rca_of_issue: Bug: SharePreview.js at line 23 destructured `platform: savedPlatform` from `res.data`, but the backend stores platform inside `ad_data` (not at the root of the share document). The ShareButton.js sends `...adData, platform: selectedPlatform` which the backend saves entirely in the `ad_data` field. Fix: Changed to read `ad_data?.platform` first before falling back to `res.data.platform`.
